design_philosophy: A premium legal organization website blending modern editorial design with trust-first client conversion. It uses a sophisticated color palette of deep navy, gold, and white (with burgundy accents tied to the logo) to project authority, integrity, and high-end professionalism. The layout employs asymmetric bento grids, generous white space, and subtle motion to create a curated, rather than generic, law firm aesthetic.

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous Spacing (p-8 to p-24) to create a sense of premium editorial breathing room.
layout_and_spacing.bento_grid: Use 'Tetris Grid' for 'Mengapa Memilih Kami' and 'Layanan Kami' sections, blending col-span-1 and col-span-2 cards.

components.header: Crystal Glassmorphism: sticky top-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/90 border-b border-slate-200. Must include logo, nav links, and primary CTA button.
components.hero: min-h-[85vh] flex items-center. Use hero_background with heavy dark overlay (bg-[#5C130C]/80) to ensure text contrast. Stark white serif typography and gold accent buttons.
components.cards: Subtle Neumorphism / Flat Modern: bg-white rounded-xl border border-slate-200 shadow-sm hover:shadow-lg hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-300.

buttons.primary: bg-[#D4AF37] hover:bg-[#C5A059] text-[#5C130C] font-semibold rounded-none px-8 py-3 transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white text-white hover:bg-white hover:text-[#5C130C] rounded-none px-8 py-3 transition-colors
buttons.dark_outline: bg-transparent border border-[#5C130C] text-[#5C130C] hover:bg-[#5C130C] hover:text-white rounded-none px-8 py-3 transition-colors

components.whatsapp_float: Fixed bottom-6 right-6 z-50 bg-[#25D366] text-white p-4 rounded-full shadow-lg hover:scale-110 transition-transform flex items-center justify-center

icons.usage: Use icons generously in Service and Feature cards to break up text visually.

animations.page_load: Fade in and slide up (y: 20 -> 0) for hero text, duration 0.6s
animations.scroll: Staggered fade-in for bento grid cards (staggerChildren: 0.1)
animations.hover: Scale 1.02 on images, button background color shift

accessibility.contrast: Ensure white text on #5C130C and #D4AF37 meets APCA ratios. Use text-slate-800 on white backgrounds.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='hero-consult-button')

sections_mapping.Hero: Headline 'Akses Bantuan Hukum yang Adil untuk Semua'. Use hero_background with heavy dark overlay. CTAs: Konsultasi Hukum (primary gold), Hubungi Kami (secondary outline white).
sections_mapping.Tentang_Kami: Split layout: Text on left (Vision, Mission, Values), about_image on right. Values as modern bullet points with Lucide icons.
sections_mapping.Layanan_Kami: Bento Grid (3 columns). 6 cards: Bantuan Hukum, Konsultasi Hukum, Advokasi Hukum, Penyuluhan Hukum, Kajian Kebijakan, Pos Bantuan Hukum.
sections_mapping.Fokus_Pengabdian: Bento Grid (2 or 3 columns). 6 cards with subtle hover effects. Topics: HAM, Keadilan Sosial, Perlindungan Kelompok Rentan, Pendidikan Hukum, Demokrasi & Partisipasi Publik, Lingkungan.
sections_mapping.Program_Kerja: 4 cards in a 2x2 grid. Deep navy background (#5C130C) section to contrast with white sections, text in white and gold.
sections_mapping.Mengapa_Memilih_Kami: Grid of 6 feature cards on light background. Minimalist icons, clean typography.
sections_mapping.Struktur_Organisasi: 4 profile cards (Ketua: Yose Desman, S.H.; Sekretaris: Pandi Siswanto; Bendahara: Eka Rina Wahyuni, S.H.; Pengawas: Bilton Ariansyah).
sections_mapping.Testimonial: Carousel or grid of quotes. Use subtle quotation mark watermarks.
sections_mapping.FAQ: Shadcn Accordion component. Clean, bordered, left-aligned.
sections_mapping.Blog_Preview: 3 card grid with image, date, title, and 'Baca Selengkapnya' link.
sections_mapping.Gallery: Masonry or 3x2 grid of images (use community_image, lawyer_meeting, justice_scale).
sections_mapping.CTA_Section: Deep Navy background, Gold text accent. 'Konsultasi Sekarang', 'Hubungi WhatsApp'.
sections_mapping.Footer: Dark theme (#5C130C). Include Gedung Multika Lantai 4 Suites 408 address, Links, Contact form.
